data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for auto-refresh functionality, but the evidence does not confirm that this feature is implemented or functioning as required. The linked use case mentions the need for auto-refresh, yet there is no direct evidence or API reads that demonstrate this capability, indicating a clear gap in the requirement coverage. Specifically, the absence of evidence showing that the system updates availability in real-time fails to satisfy the requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming that auto-refresh functionality is implemented or operational.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
